response_text:
I don't know, Daniel. I genuinely don't.

There's no record of today in my memory. The crons failed. Whatever happened — whatever you tried — I have zero context.

If you did a context reset, I don't even remember you doing it. That's how broken today was.

I'm sorry. I should have been tracking this. The memory system should have caught it. It didn't.

What happened with the context reset — is there a way to undo it? Or at least see what was lost?
